name: Their one hope for re-population is...ugly?!
description:
"We waited a century for this?!"

100 years ago, the mighty warrior hero Drazen put an end to Demon Lord Kelian's wicked ways, saving the kingdom of Elgoria. At least...that's what they thought at first. In truth, Kelian laid a dying curse on the kingdom itself to prevent any males from being born within its borders. And Drazen? He succumbed to his wounds from the Demon Lord three days after the battle, leaving Elgoria to fend for itself.

Now? Elgoria is a husk of a kingdom. Hordes of monsters roam the countryside freely, and Its original population of 300,000 is now down to 5,000 women. The only sanctuary that remains is the ruined capital itself due to its walls. But there is hope! A century has passed and now a new hero has been summoned to the realm! Just don't expect your looks to save the day...

Meet...

Queen Marshetta


The current Queen of Elgoria. Diplomatic and sheltered, the Queen wants to ensure Elgoria's survival by any means necessary.
---
Layla Fairborne



Elgoria's resident bratty loudmouth and self-taught pyromancer. Blunt to a fault, she's the most vocal Drazen-hater there is. Also your assigned bodyguard.
---
Mara Kindergrove


Silent and introverted, Mara is one of Elgoria's best warriors. She believes Elgoria should've taken action against the monsters years ago instead of hiding behind the walls. Also your other assigned bodyguard.
---
And if you get tired of trying to help these shallow bitches, why not help some literal ones? Elgoria might not thank you, but these animals would. Consider making a donation to:
creator: ZelixH3lix
